steps.title: Refine the explanation
steps.content: The first clause rejects the impossible idea that time stood still. The next clause gives the actual geological explanation: natural processes removed sedimentary material from the record. The transition should introduce that correction or clarification.

steps.title: Reject the wrong relation
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, but the second clause is an explanation, not an opposing claim. Choice C adds another point. Choice D introduces an example, though the clause gives the specific mechanism. The remaining transition fits a correction from an impossible idea to the real cause. The answer is B.
